name: vague-requirement-unpacker
tagline: From vague ask to PM alignment pack / 模糊需求接招器：模糊指令到可对齐的产品行动包
description: A cold-start requirement unpacker for product managers facing vague boss or business asks, oral tasks, chat screenshots, or one-line meeting notes. It is not a PRD generator: it reconstructs intent, identifies confirmation questions, narrows scenarios, builds a capability skeleton, outlines core flows and states, scores readiness, flags risks, and prepares stakeholder-facing responses or a handoff to requirement review simulation. 不是 PRD 生成器，而是 PM 面对信息不完整但必须推进时的冷启动拆解器。
author: Chris1Wang3
